summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SYNQRA AI Agent Platform. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend-backend integration working, premium UI implemented. Minor registration form issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Name field selector mismatch - form field labeled 'Full Name' but script expects placeholder with 'name'
Console warnings about chart width/height dimensions (charts still render correctly)

integration_issues.issue: Registration form submission not redirecting to dashboard (backend API works, frontend integration issue)

passed_tests: Backend API Health Check - 100% pass rate (13/13 endpoints)
Landing page renders with hero, features, pricing sections
User login authentication and JWT token handling
Dashboard overview loads with user stats and navigation
Premium dark UI with glassmorphism effects implemented
AI Chat backend integration (Claude Opus 4.5 working)
User session management and logout functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix registration form field selectors - update form to use consistent placeholder text or update form submission handler. Registration backend API is working correctly, issue is in frontend form handling.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - Core functionality working, minor form issues
